desk.name: desk
desk.notes: room_open annotated table. Target is south of the table so the front camera faces the table.

doorway.name: doorway
doorway.notes: room_open annotated doorway/entrance. Target is inside the open area, offset away from the wall.

front_door.name: front_door
front_door.notes: Compatibility alias for front_door_in. Use front_door_out when the camera must face the doorway/outside.

front_door_in.name: front_door_in
front_door_in.notes: room_open indoor door pass-through target. The front camera faces into the room; this is the safe waypoint for doorway-to-room routes.

front_door_out.name: front_door_out
front_door_out.notes: room_open indoor door photo target. The front camera faces the doorway/outside; use only when explicitly looking out through the door.

window.name: window
window.notes: room_open annotated window. Target is offset inward from the right wall and faces the window.

workstation_1.name: workstation_1
workstation_1.notes: room_open annotated workstation 1. Target is north of the marked area so the front camera faces it.

workstation_2.name: workstation_2
workstation_2.notes: room_open annotated workstation 2. Target is north of the marked area so the front camera faces it.

workstation_3.name: workstation_3
workstation_3.notes: room_open annotated workstation 3. Target is north of the marked area so the front camera faces it.

workstation_4.name: workstation_4
workstation_4.notes: room_open annotated lower/right workstation 4. Target is north of the marked area so the front camera faces it.

workstation_4_upper.name: workstation_4_upper
workstation_4_upper.notes: room_open annotated upper workstation 4. Target is south of the marked area so the front camera faces it.
